record.field: Thank You for Your Tour Inquiry - {{ object.name }}

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #0066cc; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
Thank you for your interest in our tour packages! We have received your inquiry and our team will get back to you shortly.

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #0066cc;
div.p: Your Inquiry Reference: — please quote this in any correspondence.
One of our travel consultants will review your inquiry and contact you within 24 hours with more details and a customized quotation.
If you have any urgent questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
Best regards,

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #28a745; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
Thank you for your patience! We are pleased to provide you with a quotation for your tour.

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;

div.p: This quotation is valid for 7 days from the date of this email.

div.style: text-align: center; margin: 30px 0;

a.style: background-color: #28a745; color: white; padding: 12px 30px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; display: inline-block;

div.p: If you have any questions or would like to proceed with the booking, please contact us.
Best regards,

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #0066cc; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
Congratulations! Your tour booking has been confirmed. We're excited to have you join us on this amazing journey!

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #0066cc;
div.p: Travel Date: to
Passengers: Adults , Children , Infants

div.style: background-color: #fff3cd; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #ffc107;

ul.li: Please carry this booking confirmation with you
Arrive at the meeting point 15 minutes before departure
Bring valid ID proof for all passengers
Check weather conditions before your trip

div.p: You can view your booking details and manage your trip from your customer portal.

div.style: text-align: center; margin: 30px 0;

a.style: background-color: #0066cc; color: white; padding: 12px 30px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; display: inline-block;

div.p: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
Safe travels!

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #17a2b8; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
This is a friendly reminder that your tour adventure starts today! We hope you're all packed and ready for an incredible experience.

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #17a2b8;
div.p: Duration: Days / Nights
Travel Date: to
Passengers: Adults , Children , Infants

div.style: background-color: #d4edda; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;

div.p: Have a wonderful journey! Our team is ready to make your experience unforgettable.
Safe travels!

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

record.field: Thank You for Traveling with Us! - {{ object.name }}

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #28a745; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
We hope you had an amazing experience on your tour with us! Your journey has come to an end, and we'd love to hear about your adventure.

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;
div.p: Travel Date: to
Status: Completed

div.style: background-color: #fff3cd; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; text-align: center;
div.p: Your feedback helps us improve our services and create better experiences for future travelers.

a.style: background-color: #ffc107; color: #333; padding: 10px 25px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px;

div.style: background-color: #e7f3ff; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; text-align: center;
div.p: Explore our other exciting tour packages and get special returning customer discounts!

a.style: background-color: #0066cc; color: white; padding: 10px 25px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px;

div.p: Thank you for choosing us for your travel needs. We look forward to serving you again!
Warm regards,

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #28a745; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
Thank you! We have successfully received your payment for your tour booking.

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;
background-color: #fff3cd; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #ffc107;
div.p: Note: You still have an outstanding balance. Please complete the remaining payment before your travel date.

div.style: text-align: center; margin: 30px 0;

a.style: background-color: #0066cc; color: white; padding: 12px 30px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; display: inline-block;

div.p: Thank you for your payment!
Best regards,

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;
background-color: #dc3545; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;
div.p: Dear ,
Your tour booking has been cancelled as requested.

div.style: background-color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #dc3545;
div.p: Original Travel Date: to
Status: Cancelled

div.style: background-color: #d4edda; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;
div.p: Amount Paid:
Our team will process your refund according to our cancellation policy. Please allow 5-7 business days for the refund to reflect in your account.

div.style: background-color: #e7f3ff; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; text-align: center;
div.p: We'd love to help you plan your next adventure!

a.style: background-color: #0066cc; color: white; padding: 10px 25px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px;

div.p: If you have any questions about the cancellation or refund, please contact us.
Best regards,

div.style: background-color: #333; color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
div.p: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.
